      @GetMapping("/acknowledge/{idUser}/{idSkill}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Acknowledge> get(@PathVariable int idUser, @PathVariable int idSkill)

    • create

      @PostMapping("/acknowledge") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Acknowledge> create(@RequestBody @Valid @Valid Acknowledge acknowledgeToInsert)

    • delete

      @DeleteMapping("/acknowledge/{idUser}/{idSkill}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> delete(@PathVariable int idUser, @PathVariable int idSkill)

    • update

      @PutMapping("/acknowledge/{idUser}/{idSkill}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> update(@PathVariable int idUser, @PathVariable int idSkill, @RequestBody @Valid @Valid Acknowledge acknowledgeToUpdate)
